texto: I'm not a perfect girl my hair doesn't always stay in place and i spill things a lot I'm pretty clumsy and sometimes I have a broken heart my friends and I sometimes fight and maybe some days nothing goes right but when I think about it and take a step back and remember how beautiful life truly is and maybe just maybe I like being imperfect<3
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Allie Roberts: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “I'm not a perfect girl my hair doesn't always stay in place and i spill things a lot I'm pretty c…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, beautiful, maybe pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e reflexao.
